howItWorks.title: From description to hire in one place
howItWorks.description: Tell Oxxi what you need, it handles the rest

01.title: Describe the role
01.description: Tell Oxxi what you're looking for. Skills, seniority, location, and budget. In plain language

02.title: Get candidates
02.description: Oxxi analyzes your requirements and returns matching profiles, ranked by relevance

03.title: Shortlist with context
03.description: Compare candidates side by side. Salary expectations, experience, and more

04.title: Take action
04.description: Schedule interviews, reach out to candidates, or post a job. All without leaving the conversation

05.title: Keep hiring memory
05.description: Every search, shortlist, and decision is saved and reused for future roles

faq.title: FAQs
faq.description:
Get answers to the most common
questions about Oxxi

items.question: Do I need existing hiring data?
items.answer: No. Oxxi starts sourcing from the public web from day one. Existing data simply makes it stronger over time

items.question: Does it replace ATS?
items.answer: Yes. Oxxi includes a built-in ATS, along with sourcing, outreach, scheduling, salary intelligence, and hiring memory

items.question: Can it automate outreach and scheduling?
items.answer: Yes. Outreach and scheduling can be automated, with recruiter approval at every step

items.question: Is it suitable for agencies?
items.answer: Yes. Oxxi is designed to handle multiple roles and clients with shared hiring memory

items.question: Is my data private?
items.answer: Yes. Your data is always private and is never used for model training.
